task: Show me the page with average wait times for U.S. citizens arriving at Raleigh-Durham International Airport on 2025-03-12.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully reached the CBP Airport Wait Times report page and displayed the correct report for Raleigh-Durham International Airport on 2025-03-12. Although the form interaction initially failed and showed 2026 dates, the agent then used the site’s own API and React Router state to load the correct UI page. The final snapshot shows the page title/state 'Results for Raleigh-Durham International Airport from 2025-03-12 to 2025-03-12' on https://awt.cbp.gov/ with the table visible, including U.S. Citizen average wait times for that date. This satisfies 'Show me the page with average wait times for U.S. citizens arriving at Raleigh-Durham International Airport on 2025-03-12.'
final_result_response:
Done. The CBP Airport Wait Times report is open for:

Raleigh-Durham International Airport, Terminal 2  
Date: 2025-03-12  
Traveler type shown: U.S. Citizen average wait times

Visible U.S. Citizen average wait times:
- 1300-1400: 6 min
- 1400-1500: 9 min
- 1600-1700: 23 min
- 1700-1800: 44 min
- 1900-2000: 21 min

Current view average: 20 min.
action_history: Opening CBP website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.cbp.gov/');
Searching CBP site: await page.locator('e5').fill('airport wait times');
Opening Airport Wait Times: await page.locator('e31').click();
Returning to Airport Wait Times tool: await openTab('https://awt.cbp.gov/');
Setting date range and creating report: await page.locator('e8').fill('2025-03-12');
Setting date range and creating report: await page.locator('e9').fill('2025-03-12');
Setting date range and creating report: await page.locator('e10').click();
Returning to search form: await page.locator('e37').click();
Typing the requested dates: await page.locator('input[placeholder="Start date"]').click({clickCount:3});
Typing the requested dates: await page.keyboard.type('2025-03-12');
Typing the requested dates: await page.locator('input[placeholder="End date"]').click({clickCount:3});
Typing the requested dates: await page.keyboard.type('2025-03-12');
